PHANTOM RUMBLE

Knock the other phantoms off the arena. Damage raises their percent — the higher it climbs, the further they fly. Guard, dodge, ledge-save, and punish like a real platform fighter.

P1 WASD move · W jump · Shift guard · Q dodge · SPACE tap/hold (or F hit · G smash)P2 Arrows · ↑ jump · I guard · O dodge · ENTER tap/hold (or K hit · L smash)

Tap for a quick peck, hold for a charged smash, full hold with a full meter for PHANTOM BURST. Perfect guard parries greedy hits. Ledge-save keeps close KOs playable. Hunt the rare drops: ◐ portal rift · ↯ gravity flip · ◔ chrono field · ▲ titan mode · ☄ meteor storm · ≋ stage quake · ∞ rift warp · ⁂ shadow clones. Plus ♥ heal · ✦ power hit · ◉ bomb.
